query: SELECT id, name, price, imageUrl, brandId FROM mall_products WHERE status = 'active' AND imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, name, price, imageUrl, brandId FROM mall_products WHERE status = 'active' AND imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' LIMIT 10;
